title: Assertion failure relating to typedefs of parameterized classes

features.name: typedef of parameterized class inside parameterized module
features.description: Code should include a typedef of a parameterized class defined inside a parameterized module, where the typedef uses the module's parameter to parameterize the class

features.name: parameterized class with integer parameter
features.description: Code should include a class definition with an integer parameter

features.name: parameterized module instantiation with integer parameter override
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module instantiation that overrides an integer parameter with an explicit value
